boundary: Reusable popup template owned by fractalApp UI template layer.

inputs.title: visible Dialog.Title text
inputs.description: Dialog.Description text, rendered sr-only when present
inputs.onClose: parent callback after Bits Dialog closes

outputs.render: modal popup with header, body, close icon, and optional theme-default backgrounds
outputs.close: X, Esc, and outside click close through Bits Dialog open state
outputs.focus: initial focus prefers data-popup-initial-focus, then selected option, then first option, then first focusable
outputs.drag: header drag changes popup position and clamps to viewport

rules: Bits UI Dialog owns dialog behavior and close state.
Dialog.Description must render when description exists; sr-only is OK.
Focus must start on active row before X when data-popup-initial-focus is present.
Header and body background props are optional; omitted props use theme defaults.

proof.load: Component imports Dialog from bits-ui, IconBtn from ./icon-btn.svelte, XIcon from ../icons/x.svelte.
proof.render: Popup renders Dialog.Root, Portal, Overlay, Content, Title, Description, Close, and children.
proof.interaction: X/Esc/outside close updates open=false through Bits Dialog; onClose informs parent.
proof.parentCallback: Consumer receives onClose and unmounts/hides popup.
proof.notCheckedHere: pnpm check and runtime UI proof must be run in local repo.
